what: Learn R for clinical work, by doing it
title: Learn R for clinical work, by doing it
text: R Clinical Statistics gentle, hands-course clinicians clinical researchers. write real code real-feeling clinical data first lesson, every step gives instant, kind feedback. prior programming needed.

title: Learn R for clinical work, by doing it
text: idea simple: something real R within minutes, build . Three promises hold every lesson: break anything. exercise safe sandbox. Run , get wrong, run . Red text failure. error R asking small change, nothing . never stuck. hint full solution sit one click away.

what: What you will be able to do
title: Learn R for clinical work, by doing it
text: end core lessons can take clinical dataset : pick rows columns want, count groups, sort (filter, select, count, arrange) build new columns summarise treatment group (mutate, group_by, summarise) reshape long wide, join tables together (pivot_wider, left_join) moves behind tables see clinical paper.

title: Learn R for clinical work, by doing it
text: course set interactive tutorials run computer: 0 · R clinical data — script buys , first line R. 1 · Tidy data design — one idea table shape makes everything else easy. 2 · building blocks R — objects, value types, data frame . 3 · Wrangling — filter, count, arrange, select, pipe. 4 · Wrangling II — mutate, grouped summaries. 5 · Tidy data practice — reshaping joining repeated measurements. interactive lesson ends open practice exercises, graded go.

Synthetic longitudinal labs — labs
text: Repeated measurements patients cohort: systolic blood pressure weight three visits. Long format, one row per patient * visit * measure. Built reproducibly (set.seed(2025)) patients; generator data-raw/labs.R. SBP falls faster active arm, trend found data pivoted.

title: Synthetic longitudinal labs — labs

title: Synthetic messy line list — linelist
text: small, deliberately untidy dataset cleaning lesson (M6): problems meet real intake data. Synthetic built reproducibly (set.seed(2027)); generator data-raw/linelist.R. Everything except weight stored text, mess intentional.

title: Synthetic messy line list — linelist
text: data frame 50 rows 6 variables: id Patient identifier, e.g. "L01". sex variable typed inconsistently ("Female", "female", "MALE", ...). age Age text, including non-numeric entries become NA. smoker Smoking status lower case: "never", "former" "current". arm Treatment arm: "Active" "Placebo". weight Weight kg, values missing (NA).

title: Synthetic messy line list — linelist
text: Synthetic.

title: Synthetic trial outcomes — outcomes
text: One year follow-patients cohort, analysis lessons (M10-M13): treatment response, adverse events, time--event pair censored one year. Built reproducibly (set.seed(2026)) patients; generator data-raw/outcomes.R. signal planted: response likelier active arm, active arm's event hazard lower. Like labs, table carries arm age column purpose, lessons join back patients.

title: Synthetic trial outcomes — outcomes
text: data frame 100 rows 5 variables: id Patient identifier, matching patients. response Treatment response: "Y" "N". adverse_event adverse event: "Y" "N". time Days event-free follow-(1-365). status 1 event occurred time, 0 censored one year.

title: Synthetic trial outcomes — outcomes
text: Synthetic.

title: Synthetic clinical-trial patients — patients
text: made-cohort 100 trial patients, one row . Built reproducibly (set.seed(2024)) containing real patient data. generator data-raw/patients.R. Columns stored character (factor) purpose, early lessons read naturally M2 can teach factors.

title: Synthetic clinical-trial patients — patients
text: data frame 100 rows 7 variables: id Patient identifier, e.g. "P001". age Age years (40-88). sex "Female" "Male". arm Treatment arm: "Placebo" "Active". smoker Smoking status: "Never", "Former" "Current". bmi Body-mass index. sbp Systolic blood pressure (mmHg).

title: Synthetic clinical-trial patients — patients
text: Synthetic.

title: r4clinstats 0.2.0
text: Part 3, analysis modules: M10 Describing data, M11 Comparing groups, M12 Regression, M13 Survival analysis. outcomes dataset: one year follow-patients cohort, response, adverse events, censored time--event pair. Effect sizes tuned planted signals survive seed (response 2.66, hazard ratio 0.47, clear 1). analysis arc deliberate: baseline balance (test needed), change-score t-test (p = 0.039), baseline-adjusted model sharpens (p = 0.002) — regression mean ANCOVA taught course’s trial. check_setup() now also checks survival broom.

title: r4clinstats 0.1.0
text: Four new modules: M6 Reading & cleaning data, M7 Visualisation , M8 Visualisation II, M9 Summary tables, synthetic linelist dataset cleaning lesson. M9 now teaches baseline table carry p-values : randomised trial’s Table 1 describes arms without testing (CONSORT), p = TRUE exercises compare non-randomised groups. Plot exercises accept aesthetics mapped inside geom well ggplot(), faceting exercises check faceting variable rather faceting happened (facet_grid() accepted ). M3 trimmed longer repeats M1’s tidy-data material, retitled Wrangling match menu. test harness now feeds every canonical solution gradethis grader asserts pass, checks every graded exercise hint solution. Monthly scheduled CI run, breaking tidyverse release surfaces schedule rather learner’s session.

title: r4clinstats 0.0.0.9000
text: MVP: modules M0-M5, patients labs datasets, learn(), check_setup(), use_local_library(), pkgdown portal webR taster, solution-running test harness.
